name: apex-gestor
author: Apex Gestor
description: Apex Gestor ERP, e-commerce, PDV desktop e apps mobile com Angular, Ionic, Capacitor e Electron.

scripts.obfuscate:web: javascript-obfuscator dist/apex-gestor/browser --output dist/apex-gestor/browser --compact true --string-array true --string-array-threshold 0.2 --target browser --ignore-imports true
scripts.build:web:secure: ng build --configuration production && javascript-obfuscator dist/apex-gestor/browser --output dist/apex-gestor/browser --compact true --string-array true --string-array-threshold 0.2 --target browser --ignore-imports true && node scripts/security-manifest.cjs
scripts.build:web:client:secure: ng build --configuration production,web-client && javascript-obfuscator dist/apex-gestor/browser --output dist/apex-gestor/browser --compact true --string-array true --string-array-threshold 0.2 --target browser --ignore-imports true && node scripts/security-manifest.cjs
scripts.build:electron:secure: ng build --configuration production && javascript-obfuscator dist/apex-gestor/browser --output dist/apex-gestor/browser --compact true --string-array true --string-array-threshold 0.2 --target browser --ignore-imports true && node scripts/security-manifest.cjs && node scripts/electron-package.cjs
scripts.build:electron:secure:dir: ng build --configuration production && javascript-obfuscator dist/apex-gestor/browser --output dist/apex-gestor/browser --compact true --string-array true --string-array-threshold 0.2 --target browser --ignore-imports true && node scripts/security-manifest.cjs && node scripts/electron-package.cjs --dir
scripts.cap:run:android: ng build --configuration production && capacitor run android
